# Cyber Global Technologies

> Cyber Global Technologies LLC is an IT risk, compliance, and audit
> advisory firm. Our advisory team brings 20+ years of Fortune 500 audit
> experience across every major compliance framework — SOX, SOC 2,
> ISO 27001, NIST, HIPAA, HITRUST, PCI-DSS, NYDFS, and GDPR. We assess,
> remediate, and automate compliance — senior expertise without Big 4
> overhead — and build a portfolio of compliance SaaS products.

## Services

- [Services](https://cyberglobal.ai/#services): Compliance assessments, control gap analysis, risk scoring, and prioritized remediation roadmaps
- [About](https://cyberglobal.ai/#about): Senior-level delivery with deep vertical expertise
- [Book a Consultation](https://calendly.com/fretsolivares/30min): Free 30-minute consultation

## Products

- [OutreachSafe](https://outreachsafe.com): LinkedIn outreach compliance checker (LinkedIn guidelines, CAN-SPAM, GDPR)
- [Compliance AI](https://compliance.cyberglobal.ai): AI-powered compliance analysis for SOX ITGC, ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, and HITRUST
- [InboxSafe](https://inboxsafe.app): Phishing-detection Chrome extension for Gmail, Outlook, and LinkedIn
- [PropAudit](https://propaudit.io): Self-serve compliance audits for property management (FTC Safeguards, CCPA, Fair Housing)
- [MergeMind](https://mergemind.dev): GitHub Action mapping PR diffs to SOX, SOC 2, and ISO 27001 controls
